2603.19512.title: FedAgain: A Trust-Based and Robust Federated Learning Strategy for an Automated Kidney Stone Identification in Ureteroscopy
2603.19512.paper_summary: The reliability of artificial intelligence (AI) in medical imaging critically depends on its robustness to heterogeneous and corrupted images acquired with diverse devices across different hospitals which is highly challenging. Therefore, this paper introduces FedAgain, a trust-based Federated Learning (Federated Learning) strategy designed to enhance robustness and generalization for automated kidney stone identification from endoscopic images. FedAgain integrates a dual trust mechanism that combines benchmark reliability and model divergence to dynamically weight client contributions, mitigating the impact of noisy or adversarial updates during aggregation. The framework enables the training of collaborative models across multiple institutions while preserving data privacy and promoting stable convergence under real-world conditions. Extensive experiments across five datasets, including two canonical benchmarks (MNIST and CIFAR-10), two private multi-institutional kidney stone datasets, and one public dataset (MyStone), demonstrate that FedAgain consistently outperforms standard Federated Learning baselines under non-identically and independently distributed (non-IID) data and corrupted-client scenarios. By maintaining diagnostic accuracy and performance stability under varying conditions, FedAgain represents a practical advance toward reliable, privacy-preserving, and clinically deployable federated AI for medical imaging.
2603.19512.paper_summary_zh: 人工智慧（AI）在醫學影像中的可靠性關鍵依賴於其對於來自不同醫院的多樣設備所獲得的異質和受損影像的穩健性，這是一項極具挑戰性的任務。<lb/>因此，本文介紹了FedAgain，一種基於信任的聯邦學習（Federated Learning）策略，旨在增強自動腎結石識別從內視鏡影像的穩健性和泛化能力。<lb/>FedAgain整合了一種雙重信任機制，結合基準可靠性和模型差異性，動態加權客戶貢獻，減輕聚合過程中噪音或對抗性更新的影響。<lb/>該框架使得在多個機構之間訓練協作模型成為可能，同時保護數據隱私並促進在現實條件下的穩定收斂。<lb/>在五個數據集上進行的廣泛實驗，包括兩個經典基準（MNIST和CIFAR-10）、兩個私有多機構腎結石數據集和一個公共數據集（MyStone），顯示FedAgain在非獨立同分佈（non-IID）數據和受損客戶場景下，始終優於標準聯邦學習基準。<lb/>通過在變化條件下保持診斷準確性和性能穩定性，FedAgain代表了朝著可靠、保護隱私且可臨床部署的醫學影像聯邦AI邁出的實際進步。
2603.19512.author: Ivan Reyes-Amezcua et.al.
2603.19512.authors: Ivan Reyes-Amezcua, Francisco Lopez-Tiro, Clément Larose, Christian Daul, Andres Mendez-Vazquez, Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz
